/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++   -g -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  CMakeFiles/nomo.dir/simulator/asmparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nomo.dir/simulator/cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nomo.dir/simulator/debugger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nomo.dir/simulator/ex3_asm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nomo.dir/simulator/ex3_asmparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nomo.dir/simulator/ex3_cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nomo.dir/simulator/ex3_insnset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nomo.dir/simulator/ex3_memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nomo.dir/simulator/ex3_terminalsystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nomo.dir/simulator/insnset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nomo.dir/simulator/label.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nomo.dir/simulator/memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nomo.dir/simulator/system.cpp.o  -o nomo
